finding: A digest-bound proposal can remain internally valid while becoming externally stale when later commits add queue-update inputs. Integrity and freshness are separate evidence properties.

fail_closed_conditions: current head differs from inventory_head_commit before review
queue-update tree digest differs before review
repository head advances between review and application
post-application projection does not match the reviewed proposal digest

verification.method: immutable commit-order comparison and source artifact inspection
verification.result: CM-0021 predates multiple later repository commits, including additive Frontier queue records; therefore its original inventory cannot be presumed current.
verification.strength: repository-observed; no complete checkout tree digest

limits: The connector did not expose a complete recursive tree listing for operations/queue-updates in this run.
This evidence does not identify every file added after CM-0021.
This evidence does not authorize canonical queue mutation or prove peer execution.
falsification_route: Regenerate the full inventory at current head and prove its exact input manifest equals the CM-0021 manifest despite the later commits.
privacy_boundary: Public repository paths, blob identifiers, and commit metadata only.
